description: Create a corporate account hierarchy in SuiteCRM by establishing a parent account and three subsidiary accounts. The parent account is 'Siemens AG' (Industry: Manufacturing, Billing City: Munich). The three subsidiary accounts to be linked to Siemens AG are: 'Siemens Healthineers' (Industry: Healthcare, Billing City: Erlangen), 'Siemens Digital Industries' (Industry: Technology, Billing City: Nuremberg), and 'Siemens Mobility' (Industry: Transportation, Billing City: Munich). Ensure the 'Member of' relationship is correctly established for each subsidiary.
